sections.paragraph: fem. ( 1Ki 17:16) plur. כַּדִּים m. ( Jud. 7:16 1Ki 18:34), [“Sanscrit ghada, Slav. Kad”], κάδος, κάδδος, cadus, a bucket, a pail, a vessel both for drawing (see the root כָּדַד No. 2 ), and for carrying water, Gen 24:14, seq.; Ecc 12:6 also for keeping meal, 1Ki 17:12, 14 1Ki 17:14, 16 1Ki 17:16this vessel was one which women were accustomed to carry on their shoulders. (Gen. loc. cit.)
